questionsList.questionContent: In which city did Jesus grow up after returning from Egypt?
How many days was Jesus in the wilderness being tempted by the devil?
Which disciple was a tax collector before following Jesus?
What was the name of the Pharisee who came to Jesus at night?
Where did Jesus perform his first miracle, turning water into wine?
Which well-known sermon did Jesus deliver sitting on a mountainside?
Who was the Roman governor who sentenced Jesus to be crucified?
How many loaves of bread did Jesus use to feed the 5,000?
Who was the father of John the Baptist?
Which prophet did Jesus quote in the synagogue at Nazareth to announce His ministry?
What was the name of the high priest who presided over Jesus' trial?
Where was Jesus when He was transfigured before Peter, James, and John?
Which of Jesus' parables was prompted by the question 'Who is my neighbor?'
How many days had Lazarus been in the tomb before Jesus raised him?
Which disciple denied Jesus three times before the rooster crowed?
What was the crime written on the sign above Jesus on the cross?
To whom did Jesus first appear after His resurrection?
In which pool did Jesus heal a man who had been paralyzed for 38 years?
What were the names of the two disciples on the road to Emmaus?
Which Gospel mentions the wise men (Magi) visiting the infant Jesus?
What did Jesus say was the 'greatest commandment'?

answersList.value: Love the Lord your God with all your heart, soul, and mind

questionsList.questionContent: In which city did Jesus heal a centurion's servant without entering his house?
Which prophet predicted that the Messiah would be born in Bethlehem?
What was the name of the garden where Jesus was arrested?
Who helped Jesus carry His cross?
How many tribes of Israel are symbolically represented by the twelve apostles?
What was Jesus' last name, according to the Roman register?

answersList.value: Christ is a title (Messiah), not a last name

questionsList.questionContent: In John 15, what does Jesus call Himself and His disciples?
Where was Jesus when He was tempted to throw Himself down from the pinnacle of the Temple?
Who was the 'voice of one crying in the wilderness' prepare the way for Jesus?
In which Gospel is Jeus' genealogy traced back to Adam?
What was the name of the man who gave his own tomb for Jesus' burial?
In what language was the sign on the cross written?
How many baskets of fragments were left over after feeding the 4,000?
Which disciple was a 'terrorist' or 'zealot' before following Jesus?
Which prophet did Jesus say John the Baptist represented?
What was the occupation of Jairus, whose daughter Jesus raised from the dead?
In the Transfiguration, who appeared alongside Jesus?
What did Jesus say was the sign of His return and the end of the age?

answersList.value: All of the above (part of the discourse)

questionsList.questionContent: Which of Jesus' brothers wrote a book of the New Testament?

Who was the 'disciple whom Jesus loved'?
What was the name of the father of James and John?
In which city was the pool where the blind man was told to wash?
Into which animal did Jesus send the demons named 'Legion'?
What was the name of the town where Jesus raised a widow's son?
Which prophet did Jesus quote when He cleansed the Temple?
How many apostles were present at the Last Supper?
What was the name of the man released instead of Jesus?
What was the name of the place where Jesus was crucified?
How many days did Jesus remain on earth after His resurrection before ascending?
Which of Jesus' disciples was called 'The Twin'?
Where was Jesus when he asked Peter three times, 'Do you love approach me?'
What was the name of the tax collector who climbed a tree to see Jesus?
Which of the four Gospels is known for its focus on Jesus as the 'Word'?
In which city did Jesus encounter the Samaritan woman at the well?
Who was the father of the disciple James 'the Less'?
What was the name of the girl who danced for Herod Antipas, leading to John the Baptist's execution?

answersList.value: Salome (unnamed in scripture, but known from history)

questionsList.questionContent: How many people did Jesus raise from the dead according to the Gospels?

What was the Aramaic word for 'Be opened' that Jesus used to heal a deaf man?
In which city did Jesus heal a man born blind by spitting on the ground and making mud?
What was the name of the man who asked Jesus 'Are you the King of the Jews?'
Jesus told the rich young ruler to sell all he had and follow Him. What was the ruler's reaction?

answersList.value: He went away sad because he had great wealth
